raw_title: Book Review: ‘A Terrible Intimacy,’ by Melvin Patrick Ely
book_title: ‘A Terrible Intimacy,’ by Melvin Patrick Ely
description: A new book by the historian Melvin Patrick Ely draws on court records to highlight the complex relationships between enslavers and the enslaved.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘EMPIRE OF SKULLS’ by Paul Stob
description: In “Empire of Skulls,” Paul Stob explores how a mania took over America.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Monuments of Paris,’ by Violaine Huisman
book_title: ‘The Monuments of Paris,’ by Violaine Huisman
description: After devoting her first novel to her wild mother, Violaine Huisman focuses her second on her father, a man who amassed wealth, love affairs and stories.
